title: Bouncy-Energizing Malaysian Sausages Noodles
description: A malty, bouncy-qq, energizing Malaysian dish featuring sausages, served in a stone-bowl-dolsot and adhering to ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly principles.
instructions: Cook the rice noodles according to package instructions.
Heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the onion, shallot, and garlic to the pan and sauté until softened.
Add the ginger and sauté for another minute.
Add the tofu and tempeh to the pan and cook until golden brown.
Add the Malaysian sausages to the pan and cook until browned.
Add the soy sauce, tamarind paste, and sambal oelek to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir to combine.
Serve the noodles in a stone-bowl-dolsot and garnish with chopped green onions if desired.
Enjoy your bouncy-energizing Malaysian sausages noodles!
